_**User**_

/opsx-explore  我在设计人力招聘数据分析后台的整体网页界面框架和页面功能，我预期有四个模块：

1. 员工数据管理，包含页面：全量数据导入（在职和离职两个excel全量覆盖更新所有员工数据）、招聘专员列表、一线员工列表
2. 招聘目标管理，包含页面：目标列表（含数据导入弹框（excel按月覆盖更新）、含达成进度列）、目标达成进度图表
3. 面试记录管理：数据导入（excel按日覆盖更新）、面试记录列表、招聘漏斗分析

页面导航样式和列表页面样式都参考图中的形式，左侧导航可收起，总共两层结构：模块-页面。列表页面都是筛选条件、查询按钮、重置按钮，下面是数据导入弹框（导入成功后刷新列表）、每页默认20条，支持分页。

员工角色：招聘专员（职位=招聘专员）、一线员工（职位=任意市场岗位）
招聘专员列表、一线员工列表两个页面的数据表相同，仅角色不同。
员工列：工号、姓名、在职状态、所属基地、职位、招聘渠道类型、招聘渠道名称、办公地点、入培日期、离职日期、手机号。
这个技能里有些员工数据和达成进度的说明和计算，但可能并不全面：@recruitment-progress-report@docs/人才开发目标拆解表内容说明.md 。

这是我做的半成品看板网页可以参考里面的数据指标设计：@docs/招聘负责人看板-6月.html 。

这些是我能提供的原始数据：

1. 在职和离职员工表：@离职员工信息_20260627.xlsx @在职员工信息_20260627.xlsx ，从公司成立截止到2026年6月27日，因为是外部数据源，每次导入都只能全量覆盖。
2. 月度招聘目标表：@docs/2026年月度招聘目标 ，每个月的招聘目标，当月目标经常反复修改进行覆盖更新。
3. 面试记录表：@docs/面试记录_0625.xlsx ，需要支持历史以来的整体覆盖更新的导入，也要支持按日追加和按日覆盖更新的导入。

files = [
    Path('在职员工信息_20260627.xlsx'),
    Path('离职员工信息_20260627.xlsx'),
    Path('docs/面试记录_0625.xlsx'),
    Path('docs/2026年月度招聘目标/人才开发目标拆解-5月-0622.xlsx'),
]
for path in files:

    print('sheets:', xls.sheet_names)
    for sheet in xls.sheet_names[:3]:

        print('sheet:', sheet, 'rows_sample:', len(df), 'cols:', len(df.columns))

        if len(df):

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

我建议四个模块这样定，会比把分析页分散在各模块里更清晰：

```text
人力招聘数据后台
├─ 员工数据管理
│  ├─ 全量数据导入
│  ├─ 招聘专员列表
│  └─ 一线员工列表
├─ 招聘目标管理
│  ├─ 目标列表
│  └─ 目标达成进度
├─ 面试记录管理
│  ├─ 面试记录导入
│  ├─ 面试记录列表
│  └─ 招聘漏斗分析
└─ 综合分析看板
   ├─ 招聘负责人看板
   ├─ 基地风险分析
   └─ 自主社招人效分析
```

你原来写“预期四个模块”，但列了三个。我倾向把半成品看板沉淀成第 4 个模块：`综合分析看板`。原因是目标达成、漏斗、人效、基地风险都不是单一数据源页面，而是员工、目标、面试三类数据交叉计算后的经营视角。

几个关键设计口径建议：

- `员工数据管理` 做成基础主数据。导入在职、离职两个 Excel 后，统一成一张员工事实表，字段映射时把离职表的 `离职前部门/离职前职位` 归一到 `部门/职位`。手机号、证件号属于敏感信息，后台展示建议脱敏，存储建议加密。
- `招聘专员列表` 和 `一线员工列表` 可以共用同一个列表组件和接口，只是角色筛选不同。招聘专员严格按 `职位 = 招聘专员`；一线员工建议先定义一个“市场岗位职位白名单/规则”，否则 `任意市场岗位` 后续会有口径争议。
- `招聘目标管理` 的目标导入要保留“按月覆盖”的概念。建议展示当前生效版本，同时保存历史导入记录，方便目标反复修改后追溯。
- `面试记录管理` 要支持三种导入模式：历史全量覆盖、按日追加、按日覆盖。按日覆盖建议以 `面试官填写反馈时间` 为日期边界，去重键可以先考虑 `电话 + 职位名称 + 面试官填写反馈时间`。
- `招聘漏斗分析` 目前原始面试表只有“面试反馈结果”，可稳定支持 `推荐/不推荐/备选/强烈推荐` 的面试结果分析；如果要做完整漏斗，比如投递、邀约、到面、通过、入培，需要额外数据源或通过手机号关联员工入培结果来补后段转化。

列表页统一规范可以定为：

```text
筛选区：基地 / 职位 / 渠道 / 日期 / 状态 / 关键词
操作区：导入 / 导出 / 查询 / 重置
表格区：默认 20 条 / 分页 / 固定操作列 / 列宽适配
导入弹框：上传文件 / 选择导入模式 / 校验预览 / 确认覆盖 / 导入结果
```

下一步比较值得先定的是“数据口径文档”，尤其是：基地归类、招聘渠道归一、招聘专员人效、面试到入培的关联规则、导入覆盖规则。等这些确定后，再建 OpenSpec proposal 会比较顺。

  const { port } = server.address();
  const paths = ['/','/employees/import','/employees/recruiters','/employees/frontline','/targets','/targets/progress','/interviews/import','/interviews','/interviews/funnel','/dashboard/overview','/dashboard/base-risk','/dashboard/self-sourcing','/missing'];

      if (![200, 302, 404].includes(res.status)) throw new Error(`${path} returned ${res.status}`);
      console.log(`${path} ${res.status}`);
    }
  } finally {
    server.close(() => closeDatabase());
  }
});

```bash
SQLITE_MODE=memory node - <<'NODE'
const { createApp } = require('./server');
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
connectDatabase();
const app = createApp();
const server = app.listen(0, async () => {
  const { port } = server.address();
  const paths = ['/','/employees/import','/employees/recruiters','/employees/frontline','/targets','/targets/progress','/interviews/import','/interviews','/interviews/funnel','/dashboard/overview','/dashboard/base-risk','/dashboard/self-sourcing','/missing'];
  try {
    for (const path of paths) {
      const res = await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}${path}`, { redirect: 'manual' });
      if (![200, 302, 404].includes(res.status)) throw new Error(`${path} returned ${res.status}`);
      console.log(`${path} ${res.status}`);
    }
  } finally {
    server.close(() => closeDatabase());
  }
});
NODE
```

```bash
const { createApp } = require('./server');
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
connectDatabase();
const app = createApp();
const server = app.listen(0, async () => {
  const { port } = server.address();
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/employees/recruiters?startDate=2026-01-01&endDate=2026-06-30`, { redirect: 'manual' });
    console.log('/employees/recruiters filtered', res.status);
    if (res.status !== 200) throw new Error(`unexpected status ${res.status}`);
  } finally {
    server.close(() => closeDatabase());
  }
});
NODE
```

原因有两个：

1. 在职员工表有重复表头 `职位`，导入时后面的履历 `职位` 覆盖了前面的真实职位，导致部分招聘专员没正确入库。我已修复重复表头处理，并重新导入了在职/离职员工表。
2. 招聘专员很多没有 `入培时间`，但有 `入职日期`。原来筛选只看 `入培时间`，所以 2026 周期筛不到。我已改成：优先按 `入培日期` 筛选，入培为空时按 `入职日期` 筛选。

现在用你截图里的 `2026-01-01 ~ 2026-06-30` 条件，招聘专员能筛出 7 条。页面标签也改成了“入培/入职开始”和“入培/入职结束”。

已验证：`npm test` 通过，筛选页面烟测通过。

const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');

connectDatabase();
try {
  const channelName = getEmployeeList({ channelName: '尹翔宇+JZ005942' }, 'frontline');
  console.log('channelName total:', channelName.total);
  console.log(channelName.rows.slice(0, 5).map((item) => ({ employeeNo: item.employeeNo, name: item.name, channelType: item.channelType, channelName: item.channelName })));

  console.log('multi total:', multi.total);
  console.log('base options:', multi.options.bases.slice(0, 5));
  console.log('channel type options:', multi.options.channelTypes.slice(0, 8));
} finally { closeDatabase(); }
```bash
NODE
```

<details></details>

**Considering custom dropdown options**
I'm thinking about how the select control height is set to 100%, which might make it bulky, especially if multiple options aren't refreshed. The idea of implementing a custom select with HTML is intriguing but challenging time-wise. Using CSS to limit height could work, but native dropdowns can’t be styled much. To manage this better, I might need a JS-driven dropdown, along with supporting form submissions for various options.   console.log('max height:', css.includes('max-height: 260px'));
```bash
  console.log('js options:', js.includes('data-filter-select-option'));
})().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });
NODE
```

I need to address a problem with the date picker. The user says it still selects the year, which isn't what they want. If it's read-only, the form would still submit the value. I'm pondering using a hidden date input with a custom display field that opens the picker when clicked.
**Improving the date picker functionality**

I’m realizing that positioning the hidden input might cause issues with the picker. One idea is to configure the actual input to be absolutely positioned, fully sized, but still invisible. The visible button can then sync with the hidden input’s value. I think wrapping everything in a custom "date-picker-field" could help, using a hidden date input that’s clickable. The visible button can show the current date and update when the hidden input changes. Ultimately, I might need to transform all date/month inputs after the DOM loads.
**Testing date picker visibility**

I’m realizing that if the input is hidden with display none, it might not work with showPicker due to the InvalidState issue. Instead, I’m thinking I could set it to absolute position with opacity 0, making it nearly invisible but still rendered. However, that might still cause focus selection issues while keeping the visible button functional. I also need to edit the JS/CSS to manage listeners effectively. I'll test this in a browser to see if showPicker behaves as expected since it might require the input to be rendered.

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
(async () => {
```
  const res = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/employees/frontline');
  const html = await res.text();
  const css = await (await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/public/css/main.css')).text();
  const js = await (await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/public/js/main.js')).text();
  console.log('status:', res.status);
  console.log('has simple mode:', html.includes('data-searchable="0"'));
  console.log('has search mode:', html.includes('data-searchable="1"'));
  console.log('no component margin:', css.includes('margin-top: 0;'));
  console.log('mode logic:', js.includes('select.dataset.searchable'));

```bash
(async () => {
  const res = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/employees/frontline');
```

  console.log('clear css:', css.includes('.clear-input-button'));
  console.log('clear js:', js.includes('data-clear-input') && js.includes('data-search-select-clear'));
})().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });

**Evaluating security measures**
I'm considering the potential for XSS attacks in hidden values, especially when using data from the database or user inputs. The EJS helper returns raw HTML without escaping, which could be a security issue. It might be wise to use escaping, but that could be tricky in EJS. Directly using loops might be a solution. Also, I need to ensure proper handling for JS submission, CSS, and parsing to enforce strict equality for number values.

**Improving pagination handling**
I need to enhance pagination for hidden escaping. EJS can utilize functions with unescaped values, so I could implement loops in the template more safely. However, since I'm dealing with user query strings, unescaping those might lead to XSS vulnerabilities. I definitely need to address this! Maybe I can use a function that returns an array? With EJS, I can loop through with <%= %>. I think it’s best to patch this by replacing renderHiddenFilters.

```bash
(async () => {
  const pages = ['/employees/frontline?pageSize=50', '/targets?pageSize=50', '/interviews?pageSize=50'];
  for (const page of pages) {
    const html = await (await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:3000${page}`)).text();
    console.log(page, {
      pageSize: html.includes('50条/页'),
      pages: html.includes('pagination-pages'),
      jump: html.includes('data-page-jump-form'),
      ellipsis: html.includes('pagination-ellipsis')
    });
  }
})().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });
NODE
```

**Evaluating icon options**
I'm considering changing the nav-icon text to simpler ASCII-like icons, but that may not be the best approach. SVG inline for each item can be verbose—maybe using Bootstrap or Font Awesome could help, although that would add dependencies. I think Unicode symbols like emojis aren't ideal either. Instead, using lucide inline SVGs might work. I’ll implement a small local icon sprite in the header with repeated SVGs and use generic SVG paths for various icons. But, I also need to address separators for links and make some adjustments to the CSS for the nav-icon styling.

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

。参考第一张图，我建议方向是：

1. **整体更轻**

   - 页面背景保持浅灰。
   - 卡片白底，但边框、阴影都更弱。
   - 表格线条更淡，减少当前“黑字 + 强分割”的压迫感。
2. **筛选区更像参考系统**

   - 筛选表单高度压低。
   - label 字号变小、颜色变浅。
   - 输入框高度统一到 32-36px。
   - 查询/重置按钮靠右，按钮尺寸更小。
3. **表格更规整**

   - 表头浅灰底。
   - 字体整体降一档，行高更紧凑。
   - 表格内容居中或按字段类型对齐：姓名/基地/渠道左对齐，日期/状态居中。
   - 操作区按钮放在表格右上角，像参考图那样。
4. **主色不要太蓝**

   - 当前蓝色太亮、太“后台模板感”。
   - 建议主色保留蓝，但降饱和：例如 `#409EFF` 或 `#2f80ed`。
   - hover、active、按钮、链接统一用同一主色体系。
5. **导航保持当前结构，但降低厚重感**

   - 深色导航可以保留。
   - 当前图标和选中态已经比之前好，但展开态可以把文字字号、图标背景再柔和一点。
   - 模块标题颜色降低对比，分割线更淡。

我建议做一个“参考系统风格版”的统一改造，范围包括：

- `public/css/main.css`
- 公共筛选组件
- 公共分页组件
- 表格卡片/按钮/表头样式
- 左侧导航视觉微调

不改业务逻辑，只改视觉和布局。你确认这个方向后，我就直接开始统一调整。

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: node - <<'NODE'
(async () => {
  const css = await (await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/public/css/main.css')).text();
  const js = await (await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/public/js/main.js')).text();
  console.log('fixed layout:', css.includes('table-layout: fixed'));
  console.log('ellipsis cells:', css.includes('text-overflow: ellipsis'));
  console.log('table tooltip:', js.includes(".table tbody td"));
  console.log('overflow detection:', js.includes('scrollWidth > element.clientWidth'));
})().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });
NODE</summary>

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
(async () => {
  const css = await (await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/public/css/main.css')).text();
  const js = await (await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/public/js/main.js')).text();
  console.log('fixed layout:', css.includes('table-layout: fixed'));
  console.log('ellipsis cells:', css.includes('text-overflow: ellipsis'));
  console.log('table tooltip:', js.includes(".table tbody td"));
  console.log('overflow detection:', js.includes('scrollWidth > element.clientWidth'));
})().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });
NODE
```

```
fixed layout: true
ellipsis cells: true
table tooltip: true
overflow detection: true
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

我先把现有识别结果和目标表基地做个对照，尤其看哪些一线员工基地已经能匹配目标表，哪些会形成“额外基地”。

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const targetBases = db.prepare(`SELECT DISTINCT base FROM recruitment_targets ORDER BY base`).all().map(r => r.base);
  const actualBases = db.prepare(`SELECT base, COUNT(*) AS total FROM employees WHERE position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员') GROUP BY base ORDER BY total DESC`).all();
  console.log('targetBases:', JSON.stringify(targetBases, null, 2));
  console.log('actualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases, null, 2));
  console.log('unmatchedActualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.filter(r => !targetBases.includes(r.base)), null, 2));
} finally { closeDatabase(); }
NODE</summary>

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const targetBases = db.prepare(`SELECT DISTINCT base FROM recruitment_targets ORDER BY base`).all().map(r => r.base);
  const actualBases = db.prepare(`SELECT base, COUNT(*) AS total FROM employees WHERE position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员') GROUP BY base ORDER BY total DESC`).all();
  console.log('targetBases:', JSON.stringify(targetBases, null, 2));
  console.log('actualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases, null, 2));
  console.log('unmatchedActualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.filter(r => !targetBases.includes(r.base)), null, 2));
} finally { closeDatabase(); }
NODE
```

const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const targetBases = db.prepare(`SELECT DISTINCT base FROM recruitment_targets ORDER BY base`).all().map(r => r.base);
  const actualBases = db.prepare(`SELECT base, COUNT(*) AS total FROM employees WHERE position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员') GROUP BY base ORDER BY total DESC`).all();
  console.log('actualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.slice(0, 30), null, 2));

} finally { closeDatabase(); }
NODE</summary>

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const targetBases = db.prepare(`SELECT DISTINCT base FROM recruitment_targets ORDER BY base`).all().map(r => r.base);
  const actualBases = db.prepare(`SELECT base, COUNT(*) AS total FROM employees WHERE position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员') GROUP BY base ORDER BY total DESC`).all();
  console.log('actualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.slice(0, 30), null, 2));
  console.log('unmatchedActualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.filter(r => !targetBases.includes(r.base)), null, 2));
} finally { closeDatabase(); }
NODE
```

  console.log('ignored:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.filter(r => r.base === '忽略'), null, 2));
} finally { closeDatabase(); }

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const targetBases = db.prepare(`SELECT DISTINCT base FROM recruitment_targets ORDER BY base`).all().map(r => r.base);
  const actualBases = db.prepare(`SELECT base, COUNT(*) AS total FROM employees WHERE position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员') GROUP BY base ORDER BY total DESC`).all();
  console.log('actualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.slice(0, 30), null, 2));
  console.log('unmatchedActualBases:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.filter(r => !targetBases.includes(r.base) && r.base !== '忽略'), null, 2));
  console.log('ignored:', JSON.stringify(actualBases.filter(r => r.base === '忽略'), null, 2));
} finally { closeDatabase(); }
NODE
```

_**User**_

@uploads 这个文件夹放的是线下excel吗？

---

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

是的，`data/uploads` 里放的是你通过网页导入时上传的原始 Excel 临时文件。

目前逻辑是：

- 浏览器上传 Excel
- 后端用 `multer` 先把文件保存到 `data/uploads`
- 系统再从这个临时文件解析数据并写入 `data/recruitment.db`

这些文件名是自动生成的随机名，所以看起来不像 `.xlsx`。它们不是业务数据库，只是上传文件缓存/留存。建议后续可以加清理逻辑：导入成功后删除，或只保留最近 N 天。

_**User**_

我怎么在cursor中浏览网站

---

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

在 Cursor 里浏览本地网站：

1. 先启动服务

   ```bash
   npm run dev
   ```
2. 打开 Cursor 内置浏览器

   - 右上角或命令面板里找 `Open Browser`
   - 或按 `Cmd + Shift + P`，输入 `Open Browser`
3. 输入本地地址

   ```text
   http://localhost:3000
   ```

如果已经打开过浏览器但页面报错，可以点浏览器里的刷新，或重新输入：

```text
http://localhost:3000/employees/frontline
```

如果提示 `ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED`，说明服务没启动或崩了，重新运行 `npm run dev`。

---

_**User**_

是什么意思

---

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

你把网址输入到**终端**里了，所以终端把它当成命令执行，才报：

```text
zsh: no such file or directory: http://localhost:3000
```

正确做法：

1. 终端里运行服务：

   ```bash
   npm run dev
   ```
2. 然后把这个地址输入到上方的 **Browser 地址栏**，不是终端：

   ```text
   http://localhost:3000
   ```

你截图上方黑色区域提示 `Enter a URL above...`，就是让你在浏览器顶部地址栏输入 URL。

try {

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const db = connectDatabase();
```

现在数据库里确实只有 5 月目标：

```text
recruitment_targets:
2026-05  46条
```

导入批次里也只有一条目标导入成功记录：

```text
scope: 2026-05
success_count: 46
```

所以筛选项只显示 5 月不是前端问题，而是 1-4 月没有写入当前数据库。

可能原因：

1. 你以为导入了 1-5 月，但实际只点成功了 5 月。
2. 之前导入 1-4 月时服务可能还没正常运行，或导入失败了。
3. 当前系统的目标导入是“单文件按月覆盖”，每次只能导入一个 Excel 文件中的一个月份；需要分别上传 1、2、3、4、5 月文件。

你现在重新逐个导入这几个文件即可：

- `docs/2026年月度招聘目标/人才开发目标拆解-1月-0209.xlsx`
- `docs/2026年月度招聘目标/人才开发目标拆解-2月-0422.xlsx`
- `docs/2026年月度招聘目标/人才开发目标拆解-3月-0422.xlsx`
- `docs/2026年月度招聘目标/人才开发目标拆解-4月-0514.xlsx`
- `docs/2026年月度招聘目标/人才开发目标拆解-5月-0622.xlsx`

导入成功后，月份下拉会显示多个月份。

_**User**_

为方便我修改页面和数据口径，我在修改期间，需要在cusor直接打开http://localhost:3000，而不是跳转到浏览器

---

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

可以，用 Cursor 内置 Browser，不要用 `open` 命令。

操作方式：

1. 终端只负责启动服务：

   ```bash
   npm run dev
   ```
2. 在 Cursor 里打开内置浏览器：

   - `Cmd + Shift + P`
   - 输入：

     ```text
     Simple Browser: Show
     ```

     或：
     ```text
     Open Browser
     ```
3. 在弹出的输入框里填：

   ```text
   http://localhost:3000
   ```
4. 如果已经有 Browser 面板：

   - 点击 Browser 区域
   - 按 `Cmd + L` 聚焦地址栏
   - 输入：
     ```text
     http://localhost:3000
     ```
   - 回车

注意：不要在终端输入 URL，也不要用 `open http://localhost:3000`，那个会跳到系统浏览器。

  console.log('unmatched by target base+channel:');
  console.log(db.prepare(`    SELECT e.base, e.channel_type, COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_no) AS total     FROM employees e     WHERE e.position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员')       AND e.training_date >= '2026-05-01'       AND e.training_date <= '2026-05-31'       AND NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1 FROM recruitment_targets t         WHERE t.year_month='2026-05'           AND t.base=e.base           AND t.channel=e.channel_type       )     GROUP BY e.base, e.channel_type     ORDER BY total DESC, e.base, e.channel_type  `).all());
} finally { closeDatabase(); }

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const frontline = db.prepare(`
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_no) AS total
    FROM employees
    WHERE position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员')
      AND training_date >= '2026-05-01'
      AND training_date <= '2026-05-31'
  `).get().total;
  console.log('frontline 2026-05 distinct:', frontline);

  const targetBases = db.prepare(`SELECT DISTINCT base FROM recruitment_targets WHERE year_month='2026-05'`).all().map(r => r.base);
  const targetChannels = db.prepare(`SELECT DISTINCT channel FROM recruitment_targets WHERE year_month='2026-05'`).all().map(r => r.channel);
  console.log('target bases:', targetBases);
  console.log('target channels:', targetChannels);

  const matched = db.prepare(`
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_no) AS total
    FROM employees e
    WHERE e.position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员')
      AND e.training_date >= '2026-05-01'
      AND e.training_date <= '2026-05-31'
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM recruitment_targets t
        WHERE t.year_month='2026-05'
          AND t.base=e.base
          AND t.channel=e.channel_type
      )
  `).get().total;
  console.log('matched by target base+channel:', matched);

  console.log('frontline by base/channel:');
  console.log(db.prepare(`
    SELECT base, channel_type, COUNT(DISTINCT employee_no) AS total
    FROM employees
    WHERE position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员')
      AND training_date >= '2026-05-01'
      AND training_date <= '2026-05-31'
    GROUP BY base, channel_type
    ORDER BY total DESC, base, channel_type
  `).all());

  console.log('unmatched by target base+channel:');
  console.log(db.prepare(`
    SELECT e.base, e.channel_type, COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_no) AS total
    FROM employees e
    WHERE e.position IN ('客服专员', '培训期学员')
      AND e.training_date >= '2026-05-01'
      AND e.training_date <= '2026-05-31'
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM recruitment_targets t
        WHERE t.year_month='2026-05'
          AND t.base=e.base
          AND t.channel=e.channel_type
      )
    GROUP BY e.base, e.channel_type
    ORDER BY total DESC, e.base, e.channel_type
  `).all());
} finally { closeDatabase(); }
NODE
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.5)**_

差距是 `20` 人，原因是：

- 一线员工列表：按 `5月入培的一线员工` 统计，得到 `381`
- 目标达成页：只统计“能匹配到 5 月目标表 `基地 + 渠道` 组合”的实际入培，得到 `361`

未计入目标达成页的 20 人如下：

| 基地          |     渠道 | 人数 |
| ------------- | -------: | ---: |
| 湖南基地-空港 | 渠道社招 |   10 |
| 济南基地-济阳 |     回流 |    5 |
| 江苏基地-淮安 |     回流 |    2 |
| 吉林外呼项目  |     回流 |    1 |
| 湖南基地-空港 |     回流 |    1 |
| 联通天津      |     回流 |    1 |

根因是 5 月目标表里没有这些 `基地 + 渠道` 目标记录，所以当前达成页计算时没把它们合进去。

建议调整：目标达成页应该展示“目标表组合 + 实际入培额外组合”，也就是即使目标为 0，只要有实际入培，也应该显示并计入整体实际入培。这样 5 月实际入培会和一线员工列表一致为 `381`。

const { getTargetProgress } = require('./service/targets/service');
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
connectDatabase();
try {
  const progress = getTargetProgress({ yearMonth: '2026-05' });
  console.log('overall actual:', progress.overall.actualTraining);
  console.log('actual-only rows:', progress.detailGroups.flatMap(group => group.channelRows.map(row => ({ base: group.base, channel: row.channel, monthlyTarget: row.monthlyTarget, actual: row.actualTraining }))).filter(row => row.monthlyTarget === 0 && row.actual > 0));
} finally { closeDatabase(); }
```bash
NODE
```

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const { inferInterviewBase } = require('./service/interviews/normalize');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const rows = db.prepare(`SELECT id, position_name, channel_tag, contract_name FROM interview_records`).all();
  const stmt = db.prepare(`UPDATE interview_records SET base = ?, channel_type = ?, channel_name = ? WHERE id = ?`);
  let count = 0;
  db.exec('BEGIN');
  for (const row of rows) {
    stmt.run(
      inferInterviewBase(row.position_name),
      row.channel_tag || '',
      row.contract_name || '',
      row.id
    );
    count += 1;
  }
  db.exec('COMMIT');
  console.log('backfilled:', count);
  console.log(db.prepare(`SELECT base, COUNT(*) total FROM interview_records GROUP BY base ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20`).all());
} catch (error) {
  db.exec('ROLLBACK');
  throw error;
} finally {
  closeDatabase();
}
NODE</summary>

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
const { connectDatabase, closeDatabase } = require('./config/database');
const { inferInterviewBase } = require('./service/interviews/normalize');
const db = connectDatabase();
try {
  const rows = db.prepare(`SELECT id, position_name, channel_tag, contract_name FROM interview_records`).all();
  const stmt = db.prepare(`UPDATE interview_records SET base = ?, channel_type = ?, channel_name = ? WHERE id = ?`);
  let count = 0;
  db.exec('BEGIN');
  for (const row of rows) {
    stmt.run(
      inferInterviewBase(row.position_name),
      row.channel_tag || '',
      row.contract_name || '',
      row.id
    );
    count += 1;
  }
  db.exec('COMMIT');
  console.log('backfilled:', count);
  console.log(db.prepare(`SELECT base, COUNT(*) total FROM interview_records GROUP BY base ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20`).all());
} catch (error) {
  db.exec('ROLLBACK');
  throw error;
} finally {
  closeDatabase();
}
NODE
```

```bash
node - <<'NODE'
(async () => {
```
  const urls = [
    '/employees/frontline/export?base=江苏基地-南京',
    '/targets/export?yearMonth=2026-05',
    '/interviews/export?yearMonth=2026-06'
  ];

```bash
    const text = await res.text();
    console.log(url, res.status, res.headers.get('content-type'), text.slice(0, 40));
  }
  const html = await (await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/employees/frontline')).text();
  console.log('has export button:', html.includes('/employees/frontline/export'));
})().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });
NODE
```

```bash
  for (const path of ['/interviews', '/interviews/funnel']) {
    const html = await (await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:3000${path}`)).text();
    console.log(path, {
      month: html.includes('name="yearMonth"'),
      base: html.includes('name="base"'),
      channelType: html.includes('name="channelType"'),
      channelName: html.includes('name="channelName"'),
      oldFeedback: html.includes('name="feedbackResult"'),
      oldInterviewer: html.includes('name="interviewer"'),
      oldKeyword: html.includes('name="keyword"')
    });
  }
})().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });
NODE
```
